overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an ancient Mediterranean setting (Assassin's Creed Origins). The player character walks along a sunlit stone waterfront promenade past textile market stalls, enters a wooden market building, and traverses a grand interior hall lined with colossal stone statues.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Mediterranean waterfront promenade with market stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone waterfront promenade past textile merchants and burning braziers

entered.detail: cobblestone walkway along the harbor edge with irregular stone paving
wooden sailing vessels with distinctive red sails on the calm water
stacks of colorful rugs and fabrics displayed on tables and the ground
metal fire basket with visible flames near the market stalls

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit stone waterfront promenade beside a calm harbor. Ancient trireme ships with red sails float in the distance while textile merchants display colorful rugs on the left. A burning brazier provides light near the stalls as the character moves forward along the cobblestone path.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden market building entrance with hanging textiles

events.description: character walks from the open waterfront into the covered market building entrance

agents.ego_description: turning right toward and entering the wooden market structure through a large archway

notable_agents.action: vendor standing near textile displays outside the building entrance

entered.detail: two-story timber and plaster structure with open ground floor and balcony above
crimson fabric banners with gold trim hanging from the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The character turns right and approaches the entrance to a large wooden market building. Red banners hang near the entrance as the character moves from the bright sunlight into the shaded interior, passing a vendor standing near textile displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market corridor with stacked rugs and wooden support posts

events.description: light increases as character approaches the exit to the grand statue hall

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit interior past piles of rugs and wooden support columns

notable_agents.action: craftsman sitting on a stool working on textiles near the wall

entered.detail: thick wooden support columns and ceiling beams supporting the structure
tall piles of folded rugs and fabrics stored along the walls
rough-hewn stone block walls of the interior corridor
tall wooden ladder leaning against the wall near the textiles

segments.scene_description: Inside the market building, the character walks through a narrow corridor lined with stacked textiles and thick wooden support beams. Stone walls flank the path while a craftsman sits working nearby. The lighting gradually brightens as the character approaches a large opening ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand warehouse hall with colossal ancient statues and dust motes in sunbeams

events.description: entering the massive hall containing colossal stone statues and sculptures
approaching the bright exit at the far end of the statue hall

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the impressive hall admiring the massive stone sculptures and ancient artifacts

notable_agents.action: worker sweeping straw and debris from the floor near the statues

entered.detail: massive stone sphinx sculpture resting on a raised pedestal
giant standing soldier figures holding shields and spears
high wooden ceiling with skylights allowing sunbeams to illuminate the dust

segments.scene_description: The character enters a vast warehouse hall filled with colossal ancient statues, including a massive sphinx and towering warrior figures. Sunbeams stream through high windows, illuminating dust motes in the air. A worker sweeps the straw-covered stone floor as the character walks toward the bright exit at the far end of the hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open waterfront promenade into the shaded depths of a grand ancient warehouse. It begins along a sunlit cobblestone path beside a calm harbor where red-sailed triremes float in the distance and colorful rugs line the walkway. As the character turns right, the scene shifts from the brilliant outdoor light into the shaded interior of a wooden market building, passing red banners and textile vendors. The camera then moves through a narrow corridor of stacked fabrics and heavy wooden beams before the space suddenly expands into a vast hall. Finally, the environment opens up to reveal colossal statues of a sphinx and warriors illuminated by streaming sunbeams, as the character walks across a straw-covered floor toward a bright exit.
